phase.en: EarthLivingCore 0.9.4 is live with a client-side ghost preview and undo for the developer-only Border Control build generator. Left-click places the visible ghost building.
phase.da: EarthLivingCore 0.9.4 er live med client-side ghost preview og undo til developer-only Border Control build generator. Venstreklik placerer den synlige ghost-bygning.
